title: India's crude intake changes towards Middle East barrels while refined product exports pivot to East of Suez
section_path: India's crude intake changes towards Middle East barrels while refined product exports pivot to East of Suez
section_path_text: India's crude intake changes towards Middle East barrels while refined product exports pivot to East of Suez
summary:
Main
As India's crude imports from Russia see a temporary slowdown and refined product exports remain East of Suez, we look at the underlying reasons
By Rohit Rathod
India's crude imports and subsequent refined product exports remained strong as 2024 ended and that momentum has continued going into January 2025. When further dissecting the underlying data, we were able to identify quite some shuffling of flows - for both crude and refined products which we shall discuss in detail in this insight blog. Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-01-27 151223.png | assets/2025-01-27_indias-crude-intake-changes-towards-middle-east-barrels-while-refined-product-ex_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_43fb3cf79bc7.png
The most important development with regards to Indian crude imports was a slowdown in imports from Russia in December.
